name: You're the One Who Should Disappear.

issues.description: Action sequence is incorrect. 'You may trash 1 card' indicates trashing is optional and conditional. The PowerBoost should only occur if a card is trashed. Current structure has PowerBoost as a thenAction (correct), but the outer action should reflect the optional nature via a condition or conditional gate.

TrashFromHand should be conditional/optional. DSL should use a conditional wrapper or make the entire effect chain optional. The card text says 'You may trash...then gains' implying optional discard triggering optional boost.
